query: SELECT id, organizationId, sectionName, taskId, completed, updatedAt, notionLastEdited FROM taskCompletion WHERE notionLastEdited IS NULL AND updatedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY updatedAt DESC;
